message:
fix: cat partial failure, grep empty stdin, mkdir/writeFile on wrong type

- cat file1 missing.txt file2 now outputs file1+file2 and reports error
  for missing.txt (was failing immediately on first missing file)
- grep with no file and no stdin returns exit 1 silently instead of
  misleading usage error
- mkdir errors when a file already exists at the path (was silently
  ignored via INSERT OR IGNORE)
- writeFile errors when a directory exists at the path (was overwriting
  directory marker in index)
